channel.title: PoliticalMethod on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in PoliticalMethod on emsenn.net

item.title: Principal Contradiction
item.description:
Principal contradiction identifies which contradiction is decisive in a conjuncture when multiple contradictions coexist. In Mao’s formulation, this role can shift as conditions change; principal status is historical, not eternal [@mao-on-contradiction-1937].

This concept is strategic: it orders analytic and political priority.

Related terms

  • Secondary Contradiction
  • Contradiction
  • Historicization

item.title: Secondary Contradiction
item.description:
Secondary contradictions are contradictions within a process that do not occupy the decisive position at a given stage. They can intensify, recede, and under changed conditions become principal [@mao-on-contradiction-1937].

Treating secondary contradictions as irrelevant is an error; the concept marks subordination, not insignificance.

Related terms

  • Principal Contradiction
  • Contradiction
